ActorFrame.Jump1Command: %function(self) if done ~= 1 and float ~= 1 then jump = 1 self:queuemessage('Jump') self:sleep(.4) self:queuemessage('Land') end end
ActorFrame.Jump2Command: %function(self) if done ~= 1 and float ~= 1 then jump = 2 self:queuemessage('Jump') self:sleep(.6) self:queuemessage('Land') end end
ActorFrame.Jump3Command: %function(self) if done ~= 1 and float ~= 1 then jump = 3 self:queuemessage('Jump') self:sleep(.8) self:queuemessage('Land') end end
ActorFrame.Jump4Command: %function(self) if done ~= 1 and float ~= 1 then jump = 4 self:queuemessage('Jump') self:sleep(1) self:queuemessage('Land') end end
ActorFrame.Jump5Command: %function(self) if done ~= 1 and float ~= 1 then jump = 5 self:queuemessage('Jump') self:sleep(1) self:queuemessage('Land') end end
